description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a dark, gabled roof and a light-colored facade, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring trees and shrubs. The front of the house has a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, flanked by symmetrical plantings. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a spacious patio area and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by additional greenery and privacy fencing. The property is enclosed by a low wall or fence, with a driveway and garage visible on one side. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a comfortable suburban home environment.
description: A two-story house with a dark gabled roof, light facade, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, featuring large windows and a prominent front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, covered porch, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the full length of the backyard with pool and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, and privacy fencing with lush greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, additional landscaping, and the connection between front and back yards.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and decorative landscaping
